name: Parasite vials
description:
One of your scientists friend knowing your peculiar kinks sent you a package, in it, 5 vials, containing curious creatures:

Vial 1: A strange black tentacle caterpillar

Vial 2: A long light red slug

Vial 3: A tiny purple star fish

Vial 4: A long thin grey worm

Vial 5: A dark blue egg breathing

With a message:

Hope you enjoy the small gifts, you may use them how you like. Individually or all in same time. Once in you, you can't remove them.

What each parasite does? Good question! Why not trying? It may be interesting!

Contents: To not spoil too much, will only say body modification / control.

Gender don't matter, will modify if needed.

The 5 parasites are inter-compatible and can lead to fun/ interesting situations.
creator: HadrianEye
